questions.stem: The book ______ by many students in our school library every day.
questions.explanation: 考查一般现在时的被动语态。主语The book是动作read的承受者，应用被动语态；由every day可知用一般现在时，结构为am/is/are+过去分词。主语是单数，用is read。A是主动语态，C是过去时被动，D是现在分词，均不符合。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem:
—______ you ______ your homework yet?
—Yes, I ______ it an hour ago.
questions.explanation: 考查现在完成时与一般过去时辨析。问句中yet是现在完成时标志词，用Have...finished；答句中an hour ago是一般过去时标志，用finished。A项第一空错用助动词Did，C项第三空错用现在完成时，D项第一空时态错误。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The girl ______ is singing on the stage won the first prize in the singing competition.
questions.explanation: 考查定语从句关系词。先行词The girl指人，且在从句中作主语，用who。which指物，whom指人但作宾语，whose表示所属关系'...的'。从句缺主语，故选A。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem:
—Do you think ______ we will have a picnic tomorrow?
—I'm not sure. It ______ rain this afternoon.
questions.explanation: 考查宾语从句连接词及情态动词表推测。第一空由答语'I'm not sure'可知表示'是否'，用if/whether；第二空表示可能性不大的推测，用might（可能）。must表示肯定推测'一定'，与'not sure'矛盾。C项第一空虽可表示'是否'，但第二空must语气太肯定，不如B项贴切。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: If you are not ______ with your current score, you should work harder to get a better one.
questions.explanation: 考查形容词satisfied的用法。be satisfied with是固定搭配，意为'对...感到满意'，修饰人用satisfied。A.satisfying令人满意的（修饰物）；C.satisfaction是名词；D.satisfy是动词。解题口诀：'人satisfied，物satisfying，感到满意用be satisfied with'。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: If you ______ the prefix 'un' from 'unhappy', you get the word 'happy'.
questions.explanation: 考查词义辨析及前缀知识。remove意为'移除、去掉'，符合句意'去掉前缀un'。A.return归还；B.rebuild重建；D.recycle回收。根据构词法知识，un-是表示否定意义的前缀，要得到原词需要'去掉'它。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: Please ______ your old clothes to the charity. They need them badly to help the poor.
questions.explanation: 考查短语动词辨析。give away捐赠、赠送；give up放弃；give out分发、耗尽；give in屈服、让步。根据语境'给慈善机构'可知是'捐赠'旧衣服。解题技巧：结合语境记忆短语，away表示'离开'，把东西给出去让它离开，即'捐赠'。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.explanation: 考查动词辨析及固定搭配。make a poster是固定搭配，意为'制作海报'。buy买；borrow借；draw画。根据上下文'关于节约用水的海报'，应该是'制作'海报，且draw通常指画画，不如make涵盖范围广（包含设计、制作等）。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Our school started a "Green School Project" last month. The project aims to make students understand the importance of protecting the environment.

Last week, our class was asked to (8)______ a poster about saving water. At first, I didn't know how to start. My deskmate Lily suggested that we (9)______ some pictures of dry rivers and lakes on the poster. "Visual effects can help (10)______ people's attention," she said.

We worked on it for three days. When we finally (11)______ our poster to the teacher, she was very pleased. She said our work was creative and meaningful.

Now the poster is hanging in the school hall. Every time I see it, I feel proud. This project has taught me that small actions can make a big (12)______. We should all try our best to protect the environment.

questions.explanation: 考查动词短语搭配。put...on...是固定搭配，意为'把...放在...上'。句意：在海报上放一些干涸河流湖泊的图片。cut切割；take带走；get得到。只有put符合语境，表示将图片放置在海报上。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Our school started a "Green School Project" last month. The project aims to make students understand the importance of protecting the environment.

Last week, our class was asked to (8)______ a poster about saving water. At first, I didn't know how to start. My deskmate Lily suggested that we (9)______ some pictures of dry rivers and lakes on the poster. "Visual effects can help (10)______ people's attention," she said.

We worked on it for three days. When we finally (11)______ our poster to the teacher, she was very pleased. She said our work was creative and meaningful.

Now the poster is hanging in the school hall. Every time I see it, I feel proud. This project has taught me that small actions can make a big (12)______. We should all try our best to protect the environment.

questions.explanation: 考查固定搭配。catch one's attention是固定短语，意为'吸引某人的注意力'。pay attention to注意（主语是人）；spend花费；take带走。解题技巧：attention常与catch/pay搭配，人作主语用pay，物作主语用catch。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Our school started a "Green School Project" last month. The project aims to make students understand the importance of protecting the environment.

Last week, our class was asked to (8)______ a poster about saving water. At first, I didn't know how to start. My deskmate Lily suggested that we (9)______ some pictures of dry rivers and lakes on the poster. "Visual effects can help (10)______ people's attention," she said.

We worked on it for three days. When we finally (11)______ our poster to the teacher, she was very pleased. She said our work was creative and meaningful.

Now the poster is hanging in the school hall. Every time I see it, I feel proud. This project has taught me that small actions can make a big (12)______. We should all try our best to protect the environment.

questions.explanation: 考查动词辨析。show sth to sb把某物展示给某人看。句意：当我们最终把海报展示给老师看时，她非常高兴。sell卖；send发送；suggest建议。根据语境，完成作业后应该是'展示'给老师，而不是卖掉或建议。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Our school started a "Green School Project" last month. The project aims to make students understand the importance of protecting the environment.

Last week, our class was asked to (8)______ a poster about saving water. At first, I didn't know how to start. My deskmate Lily suggested that we (9)______ some pictures of dry rivers and lakes on the poster. "Visual effects can help (10)______ people's attention," she said.

We worked on it for three days. When we finally (11)______ our poster to the teacher, she was very pleased. She said our work was creative and meaningful.

Now the poster is hanging in the school hall. Every time I see it, I feel proud. This project has taught me that small actions can make a big (12)______. We should all try our best to protect the environment.

questions.explanation: 考查固定搭配。make a difference是固定短语，意为'产生影响、起作用'。句意：小行动可以产生大影响。make a mistake犯错误；make a decision做决定；make progress取得进步。根据句意和搭配，选difference。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Our school started a "Green School Project" last month. The project aims to make students understand the importance of protecting the environment.

Last week, our class was asked to (8)______ a poster about saving water. At first, I didn't know how to start. My deskmate Lily suggested that we (9)______ some pictures of dry rivers and lakes on the poster. "Visual effects can help (10)______ people's attention," she said.

We worked on it for three days. When we finally (11)______ our poster to the teacher, she was very pleased. She said our work was creative and meaningful.

Now the poster is hanging in the school hall. Every time I see it, I feel proud. This project has taught me that small actions can make a big (12)______. We should all try our best to protect the environment.

questions.stem: How much plastic waste enters the ocean every year according to the passage?
questions.explanation: 考查细节理解。根据文章第二段第一句'Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste ends up in the ocean.'可知，每年约有800万吨塑料垃圾进入海洋。解题技巧：细节题要准确定位关键词'every year'和'plastic waste'，注意million（百万）和具体数字的搭配。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解
questions.group_passage:
The ocean covers more than 70% of our planet. It is home to millions of sea animals. However, our oceans are facing a serious problem—plastic pollution.

Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste ends up in the ocean. This is like dumping one garbage truck of plastic into the sea every minute. Sea animals often mistake plastic bags for food. When they eat the plastic, it can make them sick or even kill them.

Scientists are working hard to solve this problem. A 16-year-old boy named Boyan Slat from the Netherlands invented a special machine. This machine can collect plastic from the ocean using natural ocean currents. "Technology can help us clean up the mess we've made," Boyan said.

Many countries have also started to take action. Some cities have banned single-use plastic bags. More and more people are using reusable bottles and bags instead of disposable ones.

The word "strain" in the last paragraph means the pressure or burden we put on the environment. If we don't change our habits, the ocean ecosystem will be damaged. But if everyone makes small changes, we can protect our blue planet for future generations.

questions.stem: What can we infer from Boyan Slat's words "Technology can help us clean up the mess we've made"?
options: A. He thinks technology is the only solution to pollution.
B. He believes humans should take responsibility for cleaning the ocean.
C. He invented the machine when he was 10 years old.
D. He thinks ocean currents are harmful to sea animals.
questions.explanation: 考查推理判断。根据Boyan的话'科技可以帮助我们清理我们制造的烂摊子'，关键词是'we've made（我们制造的）'，暗示人类应该为污染负责并清理它。A项'唯一解决方案'过于绝对；C项年龄错误（文中是16岁）；D项与原文无关（currents是用来收集垃圾的）。推理题要基于文本，避免过度推断。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断
questions.group_passage:
The ocean covers more than 70% of our planet. It is home to millions of sea animals. However, our oceans are facing a serious problem—plastic pollution.

Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste ends up in the ocean. This is like dumping one garbage truck of plastic into the sea every minute. Sea animals often mistake plastic bags for food. When they eat the plastic, it can make them sick or even kill them.

Scientists are working hard to solve this problem. A 16-year-old boy named Boyan Slat from the Netherlands invented a special machine. This machine can collect plastic from the ocean using natural ocean currents. "Technology can help us clean up the mess we've made," Boyan said.

Many countries have also started to take action. Some cities have banned single-use plastic bags. More and more people are using reusable bottles and bags instead of disposable ones.

The word "strain" in the last paragraph means the pressure or burden we put on the environment. If we don't change our habits, the ocean ecosystem will be damaged. But if everyone makes small changes, we can protect our blue planet for future generations.

questions.stem: What does the word "strain" in the last paragraph probably mean?
questions.explanation: 考查词义猜测。根据上下文'If we don't change our habits, the ocean ecosystem will be damaged'（不改变习惯，海洋生态系统会受损），可推测strain指环境承受的'压力'或'负担'。后文'burden'也是提示词。A、C、D均不符合语境。解题技巧：通过因果关系和解释说明（burden）猜测词义。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测
questions.group_passage:
The ocean covers more than 70% of our planet. It is home to millions of sea animals. However, our oceans are facing a serious problem—plastic pollution.

Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste ends up in the ocean. This is like dumping one garbage truck of plastic into the sea every minute. Sea animals often mistake plastic bags for food. When they eat the plastic, it can make them sick or even kill them.

Scientists are working hard to solve this problem. A 16-year-old boy named Boyan Slat from the Netherlands invented a special machine. This machine can collect plastic from the ocean using natural ocean currents. "Technology can help us clean up the mess we've made," Boyan said.

Many countries have also started to take action. Some cities have banned single-use plastic bags. More and more people are using reusable bottles and bags instead of disposable ones.

The word "strain" in the last paragraph means the pressure or burden we put on the environment. If we don't change our habits, the ocean ecosystem will be damaged. But if everyone makes small changes, we can protect our blue planet for future generations.

questions.stem: What is the best title for this passage?
options: A. The Life of Sea Animals
C. Ocean Plastic Pollution and Solutions
D. How to Use Reusable Bags
questions.explanation: 考查主旨大意。文章结构：第一段提出问题（海洋塑料污染），第二段说明危害，第三、四段提出解决方案（科技发明、国家政策、个人行动）。A只涉及第二段细节；B只涉及第三段例子；D只涉及第四段部分内容。C项全面概括了'污染问题及解决方法'。解题技巧：主旨题要涵盖全文，不能仅以偏概全，注意'问题-解决'类文章的结构特点。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意
questions.group_passage:
The ocean covers more than 70% of our planet. It is home to millions of sea animals. However, our oceans are facing a serious problem—plastic pollution.

Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste ends up in the ocean. This is like dumping one garbage truck of plastic into the sea every minute. Sea animals often mistake plastic bags for food. When they eat the plastic, it can make them sick or even kill them.

Scientists are working hard to solve this problem. A 16-year-old boy named Boyan Slat from the Netherlands invented a special machine. This machine can collect plastic from the ocean using natural ocean currents. "Technology can help us clean up the mess we've made," Boyan said.

Many countries have also started to take action. Some cities have banned single-use plastic bags. More and more people are using reusable bottles and bags instead of disposable ones.

The word "strain" in the last paragraph means the pressure or burden we put on the environment. If we don't change our habits, the ocean ecosystem will be damaged. But if everyone makes small changes, we can protect our blue planet for future generations.

options: A. However, many students stay up late playing computer games.
B. In addition, remember to drink plenty of water.
C. As a result, you should give up your hobbies.
D. Physical activity is not only good for your body but also for your mind.
E. Breakfast is the most important meal of the day.
questions.explanation: 考查逻辑关系（转折）。前句说'青少年每天需要8-10小时睡眠'，后句说'没有足够睡眠会感到疲劳'，中间需要转折句说明现实与需求的差距。However表示转折，'然而很多学生熬夜玩电脑游戏'，承上启下。其他选项：B表递进（用于喝水段落）；C表结果（语义错误）；D表递进（用于运动段落）；E表强调（用于饮食段落）。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
Having healthy habits is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

First, get enough sleep. Teenagers need about 8-10 hours of sleep every night. (17)______. Without enough sleep, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

Second, eat healthy food. (18)______. Try to eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. They give you the energy you need for the whole day.

Third, exercise regularly. You don't need to run for hours. Even a 30-minute walk every day can make a difference. (19)______. It helps you relax and keeps your body strong.

(20)______. Drinking enough water helps your body work properly. Carry a water bottle with you and drink at least 8 cups of water daily.

options: A. However, many students stay up late playing computer games.
B. In addition, remember to drink plenty of water.
C. As a result, you should give up your hobbies.
D. Physical activity is not only good for your body but also for your mind.
E. Breakfast is the most important meal of the day.
questions.explanation: 考查段落主题一致性。本段主题是'吃健康食物'，选项中只有E项'早餐是一天中最重要的一餐'与饮食相关。后句'尽量多吃水果和蔬菜'也围绕饮食展开。A项涉及睡眠，B项涉及喝水，C项语义不通，D项涉及运动，均不符合本段主题。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
Having healthy habits is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

First, get enough sleep. Teenagers need about 8-10 hours of sleep every night. (17)______. Without enough sleep, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

Second, eat healthy food. (18)______. Try to eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. They give you the energy you need for the whole day.

Third, exercise regularly. You don't need to run for hours. Even a 30-minute walk every day can make a difference. (19)______. It helps you relax and keeps your body strong.

(20)______. Drinking enough water helps your body work properly. Carry a water bottle with you and drink at least 8 cups of water daily.

options: A. However, many students stay up late playing computer games.
B. In addition, remember to drink plenty of water.
C. As a result, you should give up your hobbies.
D. Physical activity is not only good for your body but also for your mind.
E. Breakfast is the most important meal of the day.
questions.explanation: 考查代词指代及逻辑衔接。后句'It helps you relax...'中的It指代前句提到的内容。D项'Physical activity（体育活动）'是单数名词，可被It指代，且内容与运动相关，符合本段主题。not only...but also...结构与后句的解释也形成呼应。A、B、E主题不符，C语义错误。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
Having healthy habits is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

First, get enough sleep. Teenagers need about 8-10 hours of sleep every night. (17)______. Without enough sleep, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

Second, eat healthy food. (18)______. Try to eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. They give you the energy you need for the whole day.

Third, exercise regularly. You don't need to run for hours. Even a 30-minute walk every day can make a difference. (19)______. It helps you relax and keeps your body strong.

(20)______. Drinking enough water helps your body work properly. Carry a water bottle with you and drink at least 8 cups of water daily.

options: A. However, many students stay up late playing computer games.
B. In addition, remember to drink plenty of water.
C. As a result, you should give up your hobbies.
D. Physical activity is not only good for your body but also for your mind.
E. Breakfast is the most important meal of the day.
questions.explanation: 考查段落主旨句。本段内容围绕'喝水'展开，'Drinking enough water...'是主题句。B项'In addition, remember to drink plenty of water'作为段首句引出本段主题，In addition表示递进，引出另一个健康建议（喝水）。其他选项：A是睡眠，D是运动，E是饮食，均已被前文使用或主题不符。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
Having healthy habits is important for everyone, especially for students. Here are some tips to help you stay healthy.

First, get enough sleep. Teenagers need about 8-10 hours of sleep every night. (17)______. Without enough sleep, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

Second, eat healthy food. (18)______. Try to eat more fruits and vegetables instead of junk food. They give you the energy you need for the whole day.

Third, exercise regularly. You don't need to run for hours. Even a 30-minute walk every day can make a difference. (19)______. It helps you relax and keeps your body strong.

(20)______. Drinking enough water helps your body work properly. Carry a water bottle with you and drink at least 8 cups of water daily.
